## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated for the change
- [ ] `pnpm test` passes locally (or `cargo test` for Rust-only changes)
- [ ] `pnpm build` passes locally (or `cargo build --release` for Rust)
- [ ] I have signed the [Contributor License Agreement](./CLA.md) (the cla-assistant bot will prompt automatically if not yet signed)
- [ ] Commit messages follow `type(scope): description` format
